channel.title: SleepMedic Blog
channel.description: Evidence-based sleep science for shift workers, first responders, and busy humans. Weekly posts on circadian health, recovery, and rest.

item.title: Why Long COVID Insomnia Isn't Just 'Bad Sleep': Unraveling the Puzzle
item.description: Long COVID insomnia isn't typical sleeplessness. Discover the neurological shifts behind wired-but-tired exhaustion and targeted strategies to gently reset your body.

item.title: Shift Work Insomnia: Adapting CBT-I for Irregular Schedules
item.description: Traditional CBT-I can feel impossible with a rotating schedule. Discover the precise adaptations—like anchor sleep and flexible restriction—that conquer shift work insomnia.

item.title: Unwiring Your Brain: The 30-Minute Night Shift Sleep Protocol
item.description: Physically drained but mentally wired after a night shift? Discover the precise 30-minute ritual to signal your brain it's time to switch off, helping you fall asleep faster and stay asleep longer during the day.

item.title: Can Your Gut Bacteria Cause Insomnia? The Microbiome-Sleep Link
item.description: Still struggling with sleep despite countless efforts? Your gut might hold the surprising key. Discover how your microbiome influences your internal clock, offering a new path to consistent, restorative rest.

item.title: The Hardest Part of Good Sleep Has Nothing to Do With Sleep
item.description: The science is the easy part. The hard part is leaving early, saying no, and accepting the social friction that comes with protecting your sleep. A real essay on sleep discipline.

item.title: The Shift Worker Sleep Protocol: A Complete Evidence-Based Guide
item.description: A full protocol for shift workers to protect sleep, manage circadian disruption, and recover faster between rotations.

item.title: Why the 90-Minute Sleep Cycle Myth Leaves You Tired
item.description: That popular 'sleep hack' often fails because your sleep cycles are unique. Discover the real science behind truly refreshing rest.

item.title: Sleepy Girl Mocktail: Decoding the Trend for Better Sleep
item.description: The viral 'sleepy girl mocktail' promises restful nights. We dive into its ingredients, what the science says, and how to approach trendy sleep aids wisely.

item.title: Reclaiming Your Rest: Debunking Myths to Fix a Destroyed Sleep Schedule
item.description: Feeling lost in a chaotic sleep schedule? We debunk common myths and offer science-backed strategies to reset your sleep and reclaim consistent rest.

item.title: Box Breathing & 4-7-8: Simple Techniques for Faster Sleep
item.description: Struggling to fall asleep? Learn how two powerful breathing techniques—Box Breathing and the 4-7-8 Method—can calm your nervous system and guide you to deeper rest.

item.title: Sleepmaxxing: Decoding the Trend, Science, and Actionable Steps
item.description: Is 'sleepmaxxing' a path to peak performance or a recipe for anxiety? We cut through the hype to reveal what science says about truly optimizing your sleep.

item.title: Harnessing NSDR and Yoga Nidra for Better Sleep
item.description: Discover how NSDR and Yoga Nidra can enhance sleep quality for shift workers and busy individuals with actionable protocols.

item.title: The Hidden Toll: How Poor Sleep Affects Your Vital Organs
item.description: Explore the long-term impacts of inadequate sleep on key organs and discover actionable strategies to safeguard your health.

item.title: What Time Should I Sleep and Wake?
item.description: For shift workers, timing sleep is crucial. Learn how to manage circadian disruption effectively with evidence-based strategies.

item.title: Box Breathing and 4-7-8 Technique for Better Sleep
item.description: Discover how box breathing and the 4-7-8 technique can help shift workers and busy humans improve sleep onset and manage circadian disruption.

item.title: The Unexpected Connection Between Memory consolidation during REM vs deep sleep and Better Recovery
item.description: Explore how REM and deep sleep impact memory consolidation and discover strategies to enhance your sleep quality.

item.title: Protecting Sleep as a Shift Worker: Evidence-Based Tactics
item.description: Shift work can disrupt sleep and health. Learn evidence-based strategies to protect your sleep and manage circadian disruption effectively.

item.title: Nighttime Habits That Help Sleep for Shift Workers
item.description: Discover evidence-based nighttime habits to enhance sleep for shift workers and busy humans. Protect your rest amidst circadian disruption.

item.title: Long-Term Effects of Poor Sleep: What Shift Workers Need to Know
item.description: Discover the long-term effects of poor sleep and how shift workers can protect their health with evidence-based strategies.

item.title: Adjust Your Schedule Without Chaos: A Shift Work Guide
item.description: Learn how to manage circadian disruption and protect your sleep as a shift worker with evidence-based tactics.
